title: UnifaceDateTime.dateTimeString
breadcrumbs: APIs: Java Call-In Classes and Methods
text: UnifaceDateTime.dateTimeString Returns a string representing the date and time in Uniface format, ‘CCYYMMDDHHMMSSTT’. String dateTimeString() Return Values String representing the date and time in Uniface format, ‘CCYYMMDDHHMMSSTT’. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
